apiKey.label: Unison API Key
apiKey.help: Your API key from app.unisonlabs.ai (or use ${UNISON_TOKEN})

brainPath.label: Brain Path Prefix
brainPath.help: Root path for storing conversation notes in the Unison brain. Defaults to /private/openclaw.

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Inject relevant brain documents before every AI turn

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Automatically store important information from conversations into the brain

maxRecallResults.label: Max Recall Results
maxRecallResults.help: Maximum brain search results injected into context per turn

captureMode.label: Capture Mode
captureMode.help: 'all' (default) = filter short texts and injected context, 'everything' = capture all messages

debug.label: Debug Logging
debug.help: Enable verbose debug logs for API calls and responses

showMemoryUsage.label: Show Memory Usage
showMemoryUsage.help: Show how many brain documents were loaded and used in AI responses
